name: hb_2_15
requirements: As part of your analysis, over 2025-08-01 to 2025-08-05 for Qiaoxi District and Xinhua District (both are districts of Shijiazhuang City, the only city containing both) compute and store: mean_pm25_qiaoxi, mean_no2_qiaoxi, mean_pm25_xinhua, mean_no2_xinhua (float).

turns.query: Help me compare air quality spatial patterns between Qiaoxi District and Xinhua District during 2025-08-01 to 2025-08-05, focusing on PM2.5 and NO2 concentration variations.
